title: Accused High Country Killer Greg Lynn Denied Bail Ahead Of Retrial For Alleged Murder | 10 News
description: Accused High Country killer Greg Lynn will remain behind bars as he awaits a retrial for the alleged murder of a retired camper. The former Jetstar pilot made his bid to be released on bail after the Court of Appeal quashed his conviction for Carol Clay's death late last year. title: Adelaide Woman Charged With Criminal Neglect After Death Of Infant | 10 News
description: A 31-year-old woman has been charged with criminal neglect after the death of an infant in Adelaide's northern suburbs. The boy was found unresponsive outside an Elizabeth Downs home and could not be revived. title: Aussie Jail Threat Over Dubai Videos, US-Iran Conflict Nears Aus, Baby Brain Confirmed | 10 News+
description: An Australian who fled Dubai as US-Iran tensions escalated claims authorities in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) threatened jail time and a $77,000 fine unless social media videos showing missiles over the city were deleted.  Australia has confirmed it will deploy military assets to help stranded Aussies return home, as the US-Iran conflict escalates and international allies come to each other's aid.  The Australian government is not talking about it, but Defence sources have told 10 News+ that ADF personnel are almost certainly right in the thick of the US-Iran conflict, likely under the AUKUS submarine deal.  A new study shows women lose 5 per cent of their brain grey matter volume when pregnant, which is the part of the brain that processes information, emotions and empathy, and it doesn't come back until 6 months after birth.  10 News+ LIVE: Trusted, in-depth reporting from Australia and around the world. 👍 Like this stream to support our in-depth coverage 🔔 Subscribe and turn on notifications for breaking news alerts ↗ Share this coverage to keep others informed  📲 Stay Across Breaking News 24/7 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/10NewsPlus/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@10newsplus/ Snapchat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/tennewsplus 🎧 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0tWZ6sIJTQ2WHgYdjgaAA7?si=cb30d7fd3d3541fa  📺 Watch 10 News+ 6pm Monday–Friday | 6:30pm Sunday on Network 10 Missed the bulletin? title: US Submarine Sinks Iranian Warship Off Coast Of Sri Lanka | 10 News
description: An Iranian warship has been destroyed by a US submarine off the coast of Sri Lanka, marking the first time an enemy vessel has been sunk by an American torpedo since World War II. At least 80 people on board were killed, while the few survivors were taken to a hospital in Galle. Meanwhile, missiles have been shot down over Türkiye and Syria, and there are growing claims that the US is arming Kurdish forces in northern Iraq.
